# immich_assets (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of assets based on search criteria.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "immich_assets" "favorites" {
  is_favorite = true
  type        = "IMAGE"
}

output "favorite_asset_ids" {
  value = data.immich_assets.favorites.assets[*].id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `city` (String) Filter by city.
- `country` (String) Filter by country.
- `is_favorite` (Boolean) Filter for favorite assets.
- `make` (String) Filter by camera make.
- `model` (String) Filter by camera model.
- `original_file_name` (String) Filter by original filename.
- `type` (String) Filter by asset type (IMAGE or VIDEO).

### Read-Only

- `assets` (Attributes List) List of assets matching the criteria. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--assets))

<a id="nestedatt--assets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `assets`

Read-Only:

- `file_created_at` (String) When the file was created.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the asset.
- `is_archived` (Boolean) Whether the asset is archived.
- `is_favorite` (Boolean) Whether the asset is a favorite.
- `original_file_name` (String) Original filename.
- `type` (String) Asset type.
